exploration_notes: The GDScript VM documentation requires these 7 core files: (1) gdscript_function.h defines the Opcode enum (154 opcodes from OPCODE_OPERATOR to OPCODE_END), the Address encoding scheme (24-bit addresses with 2-bit type tags for STACK/CONSTANT/MEMBER), and FixedAddresses (SELF=0, CLASS=1, NIL=2). (2) gdscript_vm.cpp contains the full interpreter dispatch loop (~3700 lines) implementing all opcodes via computed goto (GCC) or switch. Key macros: GET_VARIANT_PTR decodes addresses, LOAD_INSTRUCTION_A
